title: AlexLab - Rekt
relevance_summary: Private key compromise leading to bridge withdrawal with compromised validator signatures

prevention.rule: Block any tx that initiates a withdrawal from a compromised vault after a private key compromise detected

monitoring_rules: Block any tx that initiates a withdrawal from a compromised vault after a private key compromise detected
summary: AlexLab suffered a $4.3 million exploit due to a private key compromise, which led to a targeted attack on a vault admin, resulting in the draining of STX from the compromised vault. A guard could have blocked the withdrawal if it detected the private key compromise and subsequent vault withdrawal.
